languages.original_text: "Look how cleverly this beast is trying to outrun time. My gut tells me that it's related to the one we met in the ruins. Well, it can't escape its fate, no matter how quick it is."

languages.text: "Как ловко эта тварь пытается обогнать время, поглядите-ка. Нутром чую, это его родственничек встретился нам в руинах. Ну, от своей судьбы он все равно не убежит, хоть и резвый".
languages.translation_comment: after the battle with the Necron Chronomancer inside the Trazyn Museum

languages.text: "Look how cleverly this beast is trying to outrun time. My gut tells me that it's related to the one we met in the ruins. Well, it can't escape its fate, no matter how quick it is."
languages.original_text: "Как ловко эта тварь пытается обогнать время, поглядите-ка. Нутром чую, это его родственничек встретился нам в руинах. Ну, от своей судьбы он все равно не убежит, хоть и резвый".

traits.locale_text: "Look how cleverly this beast is trying to outrun time. My gut tells me that it's related to the one we met in the ruins. Well, it can't escape its fate, no matter how quick it is."
"Look how cleverly this beast is trying to outrun time. My gut tells me that it's related to the one we met in the ruins. Well, it can't escape its fate, no matter how quick it is."
"Look how cleverly this beast is trying to outrun time. My gut tells me that it's related to the one we met in the ruins. Well, it can't escape its fate, no matter how quick it is."

languages.text: 「今日と昨日を巧みに入れ替えるこのもの。遺跡で見たものと同じだと直感する。どんなに速くても運命を逃れることはできない。」
languages.original_text: "Look how cleverly this thing swaps around 'today' and 'yesterday.' My gut tells me it's the same one I came across in the ruins before. Well, it can't escape its fate, no matter how quick it is."

traits.locale_text: 「今日と昨日を巧みに入れ替えるこのもの。遺跡で見たものと同じだと直感する。どんなに速くても運命を逃れることはできない。」

languages.text: « Regardez l'habileté avec laquelle cette bête essaie d'échapper au temps. Quelque chose me dit qu'elle est liée à celle que nous avons croisée dans les ruines. Quoi qu'il en soit, elle ne pourra pas échapper à son destin, aussi rapide soit-elle. »
languages.original_text: "Look how cleverly this beast is trying to outrun time. My gut tells me that it's related to the one we met in the ruins. Well, it can't escape its fate, no matter how quick it is."

traits.locale_text: « Regardez l'habileté avec laquelle cette bête essaie d'échapper au temps. Quelque chose me dit qu'elle est liée à celle que nous avons croisée dans les ruines. Quoi qu'il en soit, elle ne pourra pas échapper à son destin, aussi rapide soit-elle. »

languages.text: "Seht nur, wie geschickt dieses Biest versucht, der Zeit zu entfliehen. Mein Bauch sagt mir, es ist mit der Kreatur in den Ruinen verwandt. Tja, es kann seinem Schicksal nicht entkommen, egal wie schnell es ist."
languages.original_text: "Look how cleverly this beast is trying to outrun time. My gut tells me that it's related to the one we met in the ruins. Well, it can't escape its fate, no matter how quick it is."

traits.locale_text: "Seht nur, wie geschickt dieses Biest versucht, der Zeit zu entfliehen. Mein Bauch sagt mir, es ist mit der Kreatur in den Ruinen verwandt. Tja, es kann seinem Schicksal nicht entkommen, egal wie schnell es ist."

languages.text: "Şu canavarın zamandan nasıl da zekice kaçmaya çalıştığına bak. İçimden bir ses, bunun daha önce harabelerde karşılaştığımız şeyle bağlantılı olduğunu söylüyor. Ne kadar hızlı olursa olsun kaderinden kaçamaz."
languages.original_text: "Look how cleverly this beast is trying to outrun time. My gut tells me that it's related to the one we met in the ruins. Well, it can't escape its fate, no matter how quick it is."

traits.locale_text: "Şu canavarın zamandan nasıl da zekice kaçmaya çalıştığına bak. İçimden bir ses, bunun daha önce harabelerde karşılaştığımız şeyle bağlantılı olduğunu söylüyor. Ne kadar hızlı olursa olsun kaderinden kaçamaz."

languages.text: «Observa con qué inteligencia esta bestia intenta sobreponerse al mismo tiempo. Mi instinto me dice que está relacionada con la que encontramos en las ruinas. De cualquier modo, no importa lo veloz que sea; no podrá escapar a su destino».
languages.original_text: "Look how cleverly this beast is trying to outrun time. My gut tells me that it's related to the one we met in the ruins. Well, it can't escape its fate, no matter how quick it is."

traits.locale_text: «Observa con qué inteligencia esta bestia intenta sobreponerse al mismo tiempo. Mi instinto me dice que está relacionada con la que encontramos en las ruinas. De cualquier modo, no importa lo veloz que sea; no podrá escapar a su destino».

languages.text: “瞧这野兽妄图跑赢时间的伎俩有多狡猾。我的直觉告诉我，它和我们在废墟中遇到的那只有关系。哼，任它跑得再快，也休想逃脱命运。”
languages.original_text: "Look how cleverly this beast is trying to outrun time. My gut tells me that it's related to the one we met in the ruins. Well, it can't escape its fate, no matter how quick it is."
